name: Self-Modifying Lean Proof Agents with Verifier-Grounded Benchmark Coevolution

description: arXiv:2607.17352v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Designing effective Lean proof agents is a central challenge in formal mathematical reasoning. Beyond building stronger provers, recent work emphasizes the workflow around Lean: how an agent decomposes proof obligations, uses tools and compiler feedback, diagnoses failures, repairs proofs, and maintains structured proof context. author: Yuqing Li, Zeguan Wu, Yu Gan, Junyu Liu
